title: Recurring Subitems
excerpt: we use certain items at the task level as “ongoing” activities that need to be tracked on the whole with recurring subitems. Currently we have to manually create each subitem. It would speed up our workflow if automation…

posts.author: nsmall (Nolan Small)
posts.cookedHtml: we use certain items at the task level as “ongoing” activities that need to be tracked on the whole with recurring subitems. Currently we have to manually create each subitem. It would speed up our workflow if automations for recurring tasks supported subitems and not just the item level.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Nolan,
You may consider creating a column that lists all common types. Depending upon the selection made from this list, you can automatically create relevant subitems and populate columns with predefined data, streamlining recurring task management
